title: Unable to use $bits on interface type parameter

features.name: interface with type parameter
features.description: Code should include an interface declaration with a parameter of type 'type'
features.snippet: interface test_if #(parameter type test_type_t = logic) (); endinterface

features.name: $bits on interface type parameter
features.description: Code should include using $bits system function on an interface's type parameter member accessed via dot notation
